description: AlphaFold pLDDT confidence plot for A0A2U1PS28 showing domain architecture and catalytic residues
code:
import requests
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches

# Re-download and parse
pdb_url = "https://alphafold.ebi.ac.uk/files/AF-A0A2U1PS28-F1-model_v6.pdb"
resp = requests.get(pdb_url)
lines = resp.text.split('\n')

residue_plddt = {}
for line in lines:
    if line.startswith('ATOM') and line[12:16].strip() == 'CA':
        resnum = int(line[22:26].strip())
        bfactor = float(line[60:66].strip())
        residue_plddt[resnum] = bfactor

residues = sorted(residue_plddt.keys())
plddts = [residue_plddt[r] for r in residues]

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(14, 5))

# Color by confidence
colors = []
for p in plddts:
    if p > 90:
        colors.append('#0053D6')  # very high
    elif p > 70:
        colors.append('#65CBF3')  # confident
    elif p > 50:
        colors.append('#FFDB13')  # low
    else:
        colors.append('#FF7D45')  # very low

ax.bar(residues, plddts, color=colors, width=1.0, edgecolor='none')

# Mark key domains
domain_regions = [
    (1, 85, 'Transit\npeptide', '#FFE0CC'),
    (86, 245, 'G-domain\n(Tr-type G)', '#D6E8FF'),
    (246, 380, 'EFTu-like\nD2', '#E8FFE0'),
    (381, 500, 'EFG_C', '#FFF0D6'),
    (501, 661, 'LepA_C\n(CTD)', '#F0E0FF'),
]

for start, end, label, color in domain_regions:
    ax.axvspan(start, end, alpha=0.15, color=color, zorder=0)
    mid = (start + end) / 2
    ax.text(mid, 98, label, ha='center', va='bottom', fontsize=7, fontweight='bold')

# Mark catalytic residues
catalytic_sites = [
    (95, 102, 'P-loop'),
    (160, 164, 'DTPGH'),
    (192, 195, 'NKID'),
]
for start, end, label in catalytic_sites:
    ax.axvspan(start, end, alpha=0.3, color='red', zorder=1)
    ax.annotate(label, xy=((start+end)/2, max(plddts[start-1:end])+2), 
                fontsize=6, ha='center', color='red', fontweight='bold')

# Confidence threshold lines
ax.axhline(y=90, color='gray', linestyle='--', alpha=0.4, linewidth=0.5)
ax.axhline(y=70, color='gray', linestyle='--', alpha=0.4, linewidth=0.5)
ax.axhline(y=50, color='gray', linestyle='--', alpha=0.4, linewidth=0.5)

# Legend
legend_elements = [
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#0053D6', label='Very high (>90)'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#65CBF3', label='Confident (70-90)'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#FFDB13', label='Low (50-70)'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#FF7D45', label='Very low (≤50)'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='red', alpha=0.3, label='Catalytic residues'),
]
ax.legend(handles=legend_elements, loc='lower right', fontsize=7)

ax.set_xlabel('Residue number', fontsize=10)
ax.set_ylabel('AlphaFold pLDDT', fontsize=10)
ax.set_title('A0A2U1PS28 (GUF1/EF-4, A. annua) — AlphaFold Confidence by Domain', fontsize=11)
ax.set_xlim(0, 665)
ax.set_ylim(0, 105)

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('alphafold_confidence.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Plot saved.")
